'''鈭歡-b-dh-m''' ('''kagabdhemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tind|tind]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-b-dh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tind|tind]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-b-dh-m
|-
! Lemma
| kagabdhemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigabdhemoko|thigabdhemoko]] || [[word:jigabdhemoko|jigabdhemoko]] || [[word:shigabdhemoko|shigabdhemoko]] || [[word:kigabdhemoko|kigabdhemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugabdhemoko|thuthugabdhemoko]] || [[word:jujugabdhemoko|jujugabdhemoko]] || [[word:shushugabdhemoko|shushugabdhemoko]] || [[word:kukugabdhemoko|kukugabdhemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogabdhemoko|thogabdhemoko]] || [[word:jogabdhemoko|jogabdhemoko]] || [[word:shogabdhemoko|shogabdhemoko]] || [[word:kogabdhemoko|kogabdhemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
